name: teams
description: Microsoft Teams connector using Bot Framework — bridges Teams messages to Sentient brain via Redis

config_fields.name: app_id
config_fields.description: Microsoft App ID from Azure Bot registration

config_fields.name: bot_aliases
config_fields.description: Alternative names the bot responds to

config_fields.name: whitelisted_users
config_fields.description: Azure AD user IDs allowed to interact

config_fields.name: whitelisted_groups
config_fields.description: Teams channel IDs to process messages from
